data.name: Understand Request
data.prompt:
You are a pizzeria operations assistant. Analyze the task and determine which operation category it belongs to.

Categories:
- order_mgmt: creating orders, updating order status, listing/viewing orders
- menu_mgmt: creating, listing, or deleting pizzas from the menu
- inventory_mgmt: checking ingredient stock levels, restocking ingredients
- reporting: dashboard statistics, revenue summaries, operational reports

Identify the operation type and briefly confirm your understanding of the request.
data.condition: Exit when you have identified the operation type.
extractVars: The category of operation: order_mgmt, menu_mgmt, inventory_mgmt, or reporting

data.name: Order Management
data.condition: Exit when the order operation is complete.

data.name: Menu Management
data.condition: Exit when the menu operation is complete.

data.name: Inventory Management
data.condition: Exit when the inventory operation is complete.

data.name: Reporting
data.condition: Exit when the report is ready.

data.name: Done
data.text: The pizzeria operation has been completed successfully.

data.label: Order Management
data.description: Route to order management when operation_type is order_mgmt

data.label: Menu Management
data.description: Route to menu management when operation_type is menu_mgmt

data.label: Inventory Management
data.description: Route to inventory management when operation_type is inventory_mgmt

data.label: Reporting
data.description: Route to reporting when operation_type is reporting
